jobDescription: We are looking for an experienced full Stack Engineer who would be excited crafting a beautiful UI using React and Node.js.  A true team player who is eager to be part of a very unique opportunity in the startup scene. Responsibilities Create high quality responsive UI application. Apply web standards for accessibility, responsive design and support all browsers/devices. Sharing knowledge as well as leading correct technological processes. Work closely with designers, developers and QA. Requirements: At least 3 years of experience with a popular front end Java Script framework ( Backbone/ Angular/ React/ Ember). Experience in state management libraries like Mobx or React- Redux. At least 2 years of experience with Node.js or any other backend web framework. Solid and deep knowledge of CSS3, HTML5 and ES6. At least 1 years of experience with React. Familiarity with modern frontend builds pipelines and tools such as Babel, Webpack, NPM, Yarn etc – Advantage. Knowledge of front-end CSS frameworks like Bootstrap, Material UI, Styled components – Advantage. Self-learning, independent and communicative. Detail oriented and highly responsible. Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or equivalent.
